query: INSERT INTO tachyon_apps_auth.oauth2_clients (id, tenant_id, name, client_id, client_secret_hash, redirect_uris, allowed_scopes, grant_types, use_tachyon_user_pool, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), redirect_uris = VALUES(redirect_uris), allowed_scopes = VALUES(allowed_scopes), grant_types = VALUES(grant_types), use_tachyon_user_pool = VALUES(use_tachyon_user_pool), status = VALUES(status)
